name: Vanguard VEO SELECT 42T Trolley Bag
description: Store, transport, and protect up to two Pro DSLR/mirrorless cameras (one with an attached 300mm f/2.8 lens), five to six lenses, a flash, and related accessories with the green Vanguard VEO SELECT 42T Trolley Bag.

features.Key Features:: Holds 1-2 Pro DSLRs, 5-6 Lenses, Flash | One DSLR with Attached 300mm f/2.8 Lens | Holds 15" Laptop and 9.7" Tablet | Multiple Pockets and Organizers | Removable Interior Divider Compartment | Quick Adjustment Straps for Tripod | Includes Rain Cover
